field.label: Automatic Signature Updates
field.help: Enable automatic updates of threat signatures from threat intelligence feeds.

field.label: Update Interval (hours)
field.help: How often to check for signature updates (1-24 hours).

field.label: Threat Intelligence Feeds
field.help: URLs of threat intelligence feeds to use for signature updates (one per line).

field.label: Custom Signatures
field.help: Custom threat signatures in YARA format (for advanced users).

field.label: Enable Quarantine
field.help: Enable quarantine functionality for suspicious files and content.

field.label: Memory Limit (MB)
field.help: Maximum memory usage for the DPI engine (512-8192 MB).

field.label: Processing Threads
field.help: Number of processing threads (1-16, 0 for auto-detect).

field.label: Packet Buffer Size
field.help: Size of packet buffer for analysis (1024-65536 packets).

field.label: Analysis Timeout (seconds)
field.help: Maximum time to spend analyzing a single packet (1-30 seconds).
